profile.name: Mohamed Sahfas
profile.title: Platform Automation Engineer
profile.subtitle: Platform Automation Engineer · Full Stack Developer
profile.tagline: Building seamless automations & full-stack solutions that connect systems and empower businesses.
profile.bio: I am a full stack web developer & automation engineer with experience in various technologies and frameworks. I have expertise in PHP, MySQL, Laravel, and a wide range of automation platforms including Make.com, Zapier, n8n, and Odoo. I enjoy building dynamic, responsive systems that meet the needs of clients and users.
